title: EQ - Two devices on one phone, change EQ on one device has no effect on the second device
scenario: EQ preset changes on one Poly device do not affect EQ settings on a second connected Poly device
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Connect Device A (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200) to the phone via Bluetooth.
Navigate to Device Settings → [Device A] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
Select a custom EQ preset (e.g., 'Bass Boost') for Device A.
Press the Home button to return to the Home screen.
Connect Device B (e.g., Poly Voyager 4320) to the same phone via Bluetooth.
Navigate to Device Settings → [Device B] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
Observe the currently selected EQ preset for Device B.
Select a different EQ preset (e.g., 'Treble Boost') for Device B.
Navigate back to Device Settings → [Device A] → Audio Settings → Equalizer and check the selected preset.
expected: Each device maintains independent EQ settings. Changing the EQ preset on Device A does not affect the EQ preset on Device B, and vice versa.
